news.paragraph: Taiwan Semiconductor is experiencing strong momentum fueled by rising demand for AI chips and its leadership in advanced node technology. The company is actively investing billions into next-generation chips and Arizona-based growth while also increasing shareholder payouts. Although the stock has climbed 33% year-to-date, traders should weigh the potential for valuation risk when considering new contracts.
headlines: Why TSMC’s (TSM) Advanced Nodes Keep It Central to the AI Chip Cycle
Taiwan Semiconductor Pumps Billions Into Next-Gen Chips, Arizona Growth And Bigger Payouts
